decisions.decision: The controller-owned lane identity index is the sole current identity authority for W1-W6. All lanes share phaseStartSha a32f509e6d9bd31ba2135940e336729bf90c3d93. The integrated predecessor is c958c872fa22edf9b2d6a0741d7781b00957903c; this freeze candidate has no integration commit yet.
Historical producer, review, audit, ledger and baseline records remain immutable evidence but no longer supply current lane identity, disposition, decision, integration status, or readiness blockers.
a32f509e6d9bd31ba2135940e336729bf90c3d93 is the one true Phase 0 phaseStartSha. A lane source base, remediation base, review base, predecessor, or eventual freeze commit is never a substitute.
Adopt W1 v9 at 89c1358925033d480bcfe3bdfee6c899df556431 as the original bundle.

Narrowly adopt the later W1 renderer census and scanner semantics integrated at 0d1a82fe2fb0c8d73b62cd3b5996b853bef2d7c3. The legacy-bypass artifact remains source-observed; this candidate only makes its raw-output locator pack-relative. The candidate legacy and scanner bytes remain pending integration and must not be attributed to 0d1a82fe or c958c872.
Adopt the approved W2 targeted A1 evidence bundle at 0bf8f2d105def1fa34dd8dedfb8d345d720dc35e while superseding its incorrect phaseStartSha claim.

Narrowly adopt the omission-sensitive W2 environment census integrated at 6d54e7c60d29812de5b96e471761486fbbc0842c. It remains source-observed and does not prove target-image provider behavior or credential canaries.
Adopt W3 and W5 evidence as a compatible evidence-only pair; retain all recorded later-phase and final-topology limitations.

Narrowly adopt the W5 command-ownership and formatting-stable evidence corrections integrated at 5d723407f287767c0f30f3d708459fb943256eaf. They remain Phase 0 evidence and do not implement or authorize hosted recovery.

Adopt W4/W6 as characterization only, including W6 current-commit artifact authority integrated at c958c872fa22edf9b2d6a0741d7781b00957903c. The exact standalone artifact remains rejected for hosted v1; final-image admission and terminal absence are unproved.

No historical file is rewritten. Supersession changes only which controller-owned record is authoritative for current state and interpretation. Historical rejection and hold conclusions cannot become current blockers without a new current decision.

Readiness remains blocked by final target-image proof, reconciled unique-bucket estimates, the final Phase 0 gate with normalized inherited typecheck diagnostics, serial bootstrap evidence, and explicit implementation authorization. None is recorded as passed by this candidate.

Phase 1 ownership, contract IDs, lane topology, and shared writers are non-authoritative proposals only until every readiness item passes, a serial bootstrap exists, and explicit authorization is received. Producer target is zero.
